text: The USPS has filed notice with the Postage Regulatory
Commission (PRC) of proposed price changes to take effect
1/27/2019. In addition to price changes, the proposed notice
includes structure changes, postage statement updates, and
The Postal Service has proposed a price change effective January 27, 2019, which will affect all mail classes and special services. A complete list of the proposed price
changes are noted in the Notice 123, https://pe.usps.com/PriceChange/Index.
The proposed price change applies to all hardcopy postage statements, https://pe.usps.com/PriceChange/Index, and electronic file submissions, including Shipping Services
Files (SSF), mail.dat and mail.XML. Refer to the January 2019 Release Overview 48.0.0.0 for a complete list of proposed changes: https://postalpro.usps.com/releases/

Mail Entry and Payment Technology October 2019 | 1
The USPS has filed notice with the Postage Regulatory
Commission (PRC) of proposed price changes to take effect
1/27/2019. In addition to price changes, the proposed notice
includes structure changes, postage statement updates, and
PERMIT AND ACCOUNT MAINTANENCE FEES PRE 1/27/19 POST 1/27/19
Annual Account Maintenance Fee (BRM) $690 $710 Certificate of Mailing 3.1%
MAIL CLASS UPDATES (LINK TO FORMS: https://pe.usps.com/PriceChange/Index | LINK TO RELEASE: https://postalpro.usps.com/Releases/Jan2019Release_Price_Change)
 First-Class Mail® and Postage Statements: PS Form 3600 FCM changed to include zone based price cells in Part C. (Lines C1-C36: (Commercial Parcels (less than
16oz), Commercial Parcels-NSA, Commercial Parcels-NSA (16oz and over), Retail Parcels (13oz or less), Retail Parcels (13 oz or less) from First Class Package Service
 SSF: Requires Entry Facility Zip Code, Destination Zip Code, and Domestic Zone
 Mail.dat: Requires the Zone value to be populated in the .cqt file
 Mail.XML: Require the PostageStatementCreateRequest zone to be populated
 Priority Mail-Permit Imprint Postage Statements: 3600-PM changed to eliminate Balloon rate price cells and convert the price cells to Dimensional rates for all zones. (Part
A lines A18-A20 and Part D lines D17-D19 (Local, Zones 1-3)).
 SSF: Requires Dimensions and the Dimensional Rate Indicator when claiming Dimensional rate price cells. Dimensions include: Length, Width,
Height, and Dimensional Weight. Dimensional Rate Indicators include: DR (dimensional rectangular) or DN (dimensional non-rectangular).
 Mail.dat: Requires a D for Dimensional Weight to be populated in the .mpu MPU Surcharge field.
 Mail.XML: Requires a D for Dimensional Weight to be populated in the Surcharge Type field.
 Priority Mail Express Postage Statements: PS Form 3560 (system generated) changed to eliminate Hold for Pickup and to add Dimensional rate price cells for all
 Part B and Part D eliminated.
 Current Part C Priority Mail Express - NSA Only becomes Part B Priority Mail Express - NSA Only. &
 Current Part E Tote Pickup becomes Part C Tote Pickup.
 Part A updated to include Dimensional rate price cells for lines A12-A19 (Priority Mail Express - Local, Zones 1-9).
 Part B updated to include Dimensional rate price cells for lines B12-B19 (Priority Mail Express - NSA Only - Local, Zones 1-9).
 SSF: Requires Dimensions and the Dimensional Rate Indicator when claiming Dimensional rate price cells. Dimensions include: Length, Width,
Height, and Dimensional Weight. Dimensional Rate Indicators include: DR (dimensional rectangular) or DN (dimensional non-rectangular).
 Package Service Postage Statements: PS Form 3605 changed to eliminate Balloon rate price cells and convert the price cells to Dimensional rates for all zones.
(Part C lines C20-C32 and Part D lines D17-D24).
 SSF: Requires Dimensions and the Dimensional Rate Indicator when claiming Dimensional rate price cells. Dimensions include: Length, Width,
Height, and Dimensional Weight. Dimensional Rate Indicators include: DR (dimensional rectangular) or DN (dimensional non-rectangular).
 Mail.dat: Requires a D for Dimensional Weight to be populated in the .mpu MPU Surcharge field.
 Mail.XML: Requires a D for Dimensional Weight to be populated in the Surcharge Type field.
 International Mail Postage Statements: PS Form 3700 updated max. weight for Part A First-Class Mail International Flats from 4 lbs to 15.994 oz. (Lines A3-A12).
 USPS Marketing Mail-Easy Postage Statements: PS Form 3602-EZ form name updated from “USPS Marketing Mail-Easy Nonautomation Letters, Cards, or Flats” to
“USPS Marketing Mail-Easy Nonautomation Letters or Flats”. Nonautomation Letters, Cards, or Flats
 Nonprofit USPS Marketing Mail Easy- Postage Statements: PS Form 3602-NZ prices updated to support January 2019 Price Change Release.
 USPS Marketing Mail Postage Statements: PS Form 3602-R prices updated to support January 2019 Price Change Release.
 Nonprofit USPS Marketing Mail Postage Statements: PS Form 3602-N prices updated to support January 2019 Price Change Release.
 Periodicals Postage Statements: PS Form 3541 prices updated to support January 2019 Price Change Release.

The USPS has filed notice with the Postage Regulatory
Commission (PRC) of proposed price changes to take effect
1/27/2019. In addition to price changes, the proposed notice
includes structure changes, postage statement updates, and
As proposed, on January 27, 2019 FCPS will change from a weight based pricing structure to a zone and weight based pricing structure. Table 1 below
shows the pre 1/27/19 Notice 123 based on weight based pricing (in ounces). Table 2 below shows the proposed post 1/27/19 Notice 123 pricing based
on weight and zones. Postal zones are based on the distance a package travels from origin to destination. A listing of zone locations by entry location can
The proposed price change will result in corresponding changes to both hardcopy postage statements and electronic file submissions. Hardcopy
statement changes include changes to pricing cells in support of zone-based pricing for FCPS. A complete list of postage statement updates can be found
Shipping Services Files (SSF) will require Entry Facility Zip Code, Destination Zip Code, Domestic Zone information. A complete list of SSF changes can be
Changes to Mail.dat and Mail.XML include eDoc to require Zone value to map to correct prices. A complete list of Mail.dat and Mail.XML changes can be
PRIORITY MAIL, PRIORITY MAIL EXPRESS, PARCEL SELECT AND PARCEL SELECT GROUND:
As proposed, on January 27 2019, Dimensional Weight pricing will be expanded to Priority Mail all zones (prior to January 27, 2019 only zones 5-9 were
included), Priority Mail Express all zones and Parcel Select (Ground and Destination Entry) all zones. The Dimensional Weight divisor will change from
194 to 166. The proposal includes elimination of Balloon weight pricing for Priority Mail and Parcel Select (Ground and Destination Entry). Oversized
Pricing will remain in effect for Parcel Select (Ground and Destination Entry) at DNDC’s, DSCF’s, and DDU’s. Refer to page 5 for Dimensional Weight
A complete list of the proposed prices for package products are noted in the Notice 123, https://pe.usps.com/resources/PriceChange/January%
The proposed price change will result in corresponding changes to both hardcopy postage statements and electronic file submissions. Hardcopy Postage
Statement changes include elimination of balloon pricing for Priority Mail, Priority Mail Express and Parcel Select (Ground and Destination Entry) and
Dimensional Weight pricing for Priority Mail, Priority Mail Express and Parcel Select. Tables 3 below shows the pre 1/27/19 Postage Statement changes
to Priority Mail (PS Form 3600). Table 4 below shows the proposed post 1/27/19 Postage Statement Changes to Priority Mail (PS Form 3600). Table 5
shows the pre 1/27/19 Postage Statement changes to Parcel Select Destination ( PS Form 3605-R). Table 6 shows the proposed post 1/27/19 Postage
Statement changes to Parcel Select Destination ( PS Form 3605-R). A complete list of postage statement changes can be found at, https://pe.usps.com/
Shipping Services Files (SSF) will require Length, Width, Height and dimensional weight information as shown in the example for Priority Mail in table 7.
A complete list of SSF changes can be found at, https://postalpro.usps.com/releases/jan2019Release/overview?
Changes to Mail.dat and Mail.XML include populating the dimensions fields (length, width, and thickness) and the Surcharge field with a “D” for
Dimensional Weight.. A complete list on Mail.dat and Mail.XML changes can be found at, https://postalpro.usps.com/releases/jan2019Release/
TABLE 4 PS FORM 3600 PRIORITY MAIL: POST 1/27/19 TABLE 3 PS FORM 3600 PRIORITY MAIL: PRE 1/27/19
